title: Mobile app (iOS/Android)
summary: Native/cross-platform app. Adds platform-guideline + permissions stages; the human smoke test moves onto a real device via a beta build; tail covers store review and staged rollout with crash watch.

stages.title: Draft spec (+ platform guidelines)
stages.desc: Spec including Apple HIG / Material conformance (store-review blockers).

stages.title: Local data / sync schema
stages.desc: Design local store / offline-sync schema (only if persistence).

stages.title: Permissions declaration
stages.desc: Declare + justify each OS permission (unjustified perms get rejected).

stages.title: Implement
stages.desc: Write the code per plan; review + cross-model audit.

stages.title: Device matrix tests
stages.desc: Automated tests across a device/OS matrix.

stages.title: OTA-vs-native decision
stages.desc: JS-only change → OTA (EAS Update/CodePush); native change → store build.

stages.title: Beta build smoke test
stages.desc: Real human exercises a TestFlight / Play internal / EAS build (mandatory).

stages.title: Store submit & review
stages.desc: Submit to App Store / Play; await manual review.
